message:
fix: Zig 0.15 PyModuleDef_HEAD_INIT and enum tag compatibility

- PyModuleDef_HEAD_INIT macro uses C compound literals that Zig @cImport
  cannot translate. Use std.mem.zeroes(c.PyModuleDef_Base) instead.
- HashAlgorithm enum needs power-of-two backing type for extern struct
  compatibility: enum → enum(u8).
- Applied to _hashlib, _collections, _functools, _json, binascii, zlib.
